---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for mureo
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

Example: "I need to manage X but mureo doesn't support it yet."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

A description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Component

- [ ] CLI (`mureo` commands)
- [ ] MCP server / tools
- [ ] Google Ads client
- [ ] Meta Ads client
- [ ] Auth / OAuth
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
